ci_method: 5-fold CV-AUC; 2000-rep bootstrap 95% CI on the OOF AUC
verdict: LENGTH-CLEAN (structural) — the v0 instrument uses NO total-length feature (['log_word_count', 'mean_sentence_length'] absent from its 9 features); it is not total-length-confoundable by construction. On a frontier matched corpus (n=200, d_len=+0.170) cv_full=0.834 CI[0.7767, 0.892]. Single seed/generator caveat.
